channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Streetlights cause thousands of pill bugs to form giant death spirals
item.description: Researchers found that artificial streetlights can trap woodlice in mesmerizing circular death spirals, a phenomenon never before seen in the wild.

item.title: Astronomers observe the birth of a magnetar for the first time
item.description: A strange chirping signal from a distant supernova revealed the birth of a magnetar, confirming that these highly magnetic neutron stars can form this way.

item.title: Record-breaking ocean drilling reveals why Japan's 2011 tsunami was so deadly
item.description: Scientists have uncovered a hidden weakness beneath the Pacific Ocean that helps explain why Japan's catastrophic 2011 earthquake and tsunami became so devastating.

item.title: Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's kills brain cells
item.description: Researchers have identified a previously overlooked mechanism of brain cell death that appears to play a major role in Alzheimer's disease and frontotemporal dementia.
